project_context.emotional_tone: The Performance Pro (Archetype 2) - Elite, Precise, Tactical, Trustworthy

headings.usage: Main headers, section titles, KPIs. Tight tracking.

body.usage: Paragraphs, data tables, form inputs. Relaxed leading.

mono.usage: Financial data, transaction IDs, code snippets.

primary.description: Trustworthy Blue - Use for primary actions (Save, Submit)

secondary.description: Growth Emerald - Use for Revenue, Positive Trends

destructive.description: Alert Red - Use for Expenses, Errors, Delete

accent.description: Warning Amber - Use for Pending Status, Alerts

spacing.philosophy: Generous. Use p-6 or p-8 for cards. Gap-6 for grids.

surfaces.cards: Flat background (#18181B) with 1px border (#27272A). No shadow by default. Hover: Border lightens.
surfaces.tables: Grid Borders style. Row borders only. Minimalist.

motion.micro_interactions: Hover: scale-[1.01] or border-color change. Active: scale-[0.98].

buttons.style: Sharp or slightly rounded (rounded-md). High contrast.

inputs.style: bg-background border-input focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/50 focus:border-primary transition-all
inputs.height: h-10 or h-12 for touch targets

cards.style: bg-card text-card-foreground border border-border rounded-lg p-6

charts.style: Minimalist. Hide grid lines if possible. Use tooltips for details.

images.description: Abstract artistic representation of Brazil flag colors, dark and moody. Use with heavy overlay (opacity 10-20%) as background texture.
Laptop screen showing analytics. Use for 'Features' section or Login page side image.
Professional office meeting. Use for 'About Us' or 'For Accountants' section.

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px or 2px. Consistent sizing (w-5 h-5).

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Brasília Night Operations' color palette in tailwind.config.js immediately.
Set up the font families (Manrope, Public Sans) in index.css and tailwind.config.js.
Create a 'Layout' component that handles the sidebar/header structure for the dashboard.
Use the 'Bento Grid' strategy for the Dashboard Overview page.
Ensure all forms (Revenue, Expense, Contracts) use Shadcn Form components with Zod validation.
Use the provided image URLs for the Landing Page and Login screens.
Strictly follow the 'Anti-Patterns' list: No purple/teal CTAs, no Inter headings.
